heading: Exemption
label: 1117 Exemption
text: The Director of the Office of Management and Budget may exempt from the requirements of sections 1115 and 1116 of this title and , any agency with annual outlays of $20,000,000 or less.section 306 of title 5
notes: ConstructionNo provision or amendment made by to be construed as creating any right, privilege, benefit, or entitlement for any person who is not an officer or employee of the United States acting in such capacity, and no person not an officer or employee of the United States acting in such capacity to have standing to file any civil action in any court of the United States to enforce any provision or amendment made by , or to be construed as superseding any statutory requirement, see , set out as a Construction of 1993 Amendment note under .Pub.
